response: THE FINAL WEIGHT OF THE FRAME, W_F, IS EXPRESSED AS W TIMES (0.98) RAISED TO THE POWER OF N. TO ACHIEVE A 25% REDUCTION IN ENERGY EXPENDITURE, ALEX MUST SOLVE THE EQUATION WHERE 0.25 EQUALS 1 MINUS (0.98) TO THE POWER OF N. CALCULATING THIS REVEALS THAT THE MINIMUM NUMBER OF COMPONENTS REQUIRED IS 14. CHECKING THE CLOCK NOW SHOWS THE TIME IS RIGHT TO BEGIN PREPARING. LOOKING AT THE CLOCK AGAIN CONFIRMS WE HAVE PLENTY OF TIME BEFORE THE RACE. AS THE CLOCK TICKS AWAY, REMEMBER THAT OPTIMIZING THE BIKE IS ESSENTIAL FOR SUCCESS.
